taxonomy: Coluteastrum polystachyum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It belongs to the genus Coluteastrum. This plant is native to tropical regions of Africa. Further classification places it in the subfamily Faboideae and the tribe Coluteastrum. The plant's classification is a part of its botanical and taxonomic description.
